subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1904
subcodes.first_line: In Baha'í philosophy, luck is the same as divine confirmation, which is ceaseless and continuous, never subject to interruption or suspension.
subcodes.first_line_orig: بخت در عرف دیانت بهائی همان تایید است و تایید همواره متتابع است انقطاع و انفکاک ندارد
subcodes.subjects: @free will and predestination; fate, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @nonexistence of evil; relativity of good and evil, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @knowledge; recognition of God
